ddls:
CREATE TABLE "audio_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio file */,
  "filename" TEXT /* Name of the audio file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the audio file in MB */,
  "file_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the audio file */,
  "transcription_status" TEXT /* Status of the transcription (e.g., pending, complete) */,
  "transcribed_by" TEXT /* Name of the service or person who transcribed the file */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the audio file (e.g., mp3, wav, ogg) */,
  "quality" TEXT /* Quality of the audio file (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "sampling_rate" INTEGER /* Sampling rate of the audio file in Hz */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transcript_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transcript segment */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the audio file the segment belongs to */,
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the speaker who spoke the segment */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the segment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the segment */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the segment */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text spoken in the segment */,
  "segment_order" INTEGER /* Order of the segment in the transcript */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the transcription for this segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transcript_segments_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES audio_files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transcript_segments_speaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("speaker_id") REFERENCES speakers ("speaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speakers" (
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speaker */,
  "speaker_name" TEXT /* Name of the speaker */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or additional information about the speaker */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the speaker's image */,
  "social_media_handles" TEXT /* Social media handles of the speaker (e.g., Twitter, LinkedIn) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, editor, viewer) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the audio file being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the file */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, edit) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES audio_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_metadata" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio file */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the audio file */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the audio file */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the audio file */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the file */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the file was created */,
  "modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the file */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the file was last modified */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the audio file (e.g., podcast, webinar) */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the audio file (e.g., mlops, industry trends) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the audio file the annotation belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the annotation */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date the annotation was added */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., note, comment, question) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_annotations_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES audio_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speaker_roles" (
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speaker */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the speaker (e.g., host, guest, panelist) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or additional information about the role */,
  "role_type" TEXT /* Type of role (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speaker_id", "role")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the audio file the topic belongs to */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or additional information about the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES audio_files ("file_id")
)
